content: Phase 8: Crear package services/football_moneyball/ + football_intelligence_warehouse.py (4 colecciones + índices + IO fail-soft)
Phase 10: Implementar football_snapshot_builder.py (pregame + live digest, idempotente)
Phase 11: Implementar football_pattern_memory.py (derive keys + lookup + attach con gates conservadores)
Phase 15: Integrar football_moneyball en analyst_engine.py (fail-soft, sport==football only)
Phase 15b: Endpoint GET /api/football/pattern-memory/summary + ensure_football_indexes en startup
Phase 16: Tests pytest backend football_moneyball (36 nuevos + 943 existentes = 979 total)
Phase 17: UI mínima — 3 paneles en MatchCard.jsx (Intelligence, PatternMemory, LiveVsPregame)
Phase 18: Testing agent backend — 100% verde: 979 tests, 16 índices, endpoint OK, MLB/Basketball intactos
